name: OUE Lippo Healthcare Limited
summary: OUE Lippo Healthcare Limited, an investment holding company, acquires, develops, operates, and manages healthcare facilities, healthcare-related assets, and integrated mixed-use projects in Japan and the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Healthcare Operations, Healthcare Assets, Properties Under Development, and Investments segments. Its facilities include medical centers, day surgeries, hospitals, nursing homes, and retirement communities. The company owns and operates 12 nursing homes in Japan, as well as one hospital in China. It is also involved in the rental of investment properties and assets; and trading of pharmaceutical supplies, drugs, and medical equipment. The company was formerly known as International Healthway Corporation Limited and changed its name to OUE Lippo Healthcare Limited in October 2017. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Singapore. OUE Lippo Healthcare Limited is a subsidiary of OUE Limited.
